column16: the dynamics would be rather mild, with a thin texture, i.e., few instruments. Rather pleasant and consonant.

column4: the painting makes me feel a sense of sadness
column16: A slow, sad type of sound track

column4: It makes me feel plesant and rejuvenated.
column16: The soundtrack would be cheerful and pleasant. It could use either an uplifting piano solo or a calm guitar solo in the background.
